sentence_reviews.text: Ablation and causal analysis intervene on data, modules, activations, prompts, or training choices to estimate which components actually cause observed behavior.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA covers causality, interventions, experiments, and model evaluation topics; NIST AI RMF covers test, evaluation, validation, analysis, and risk measurement for AI systems.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited sources support the main technical relationship, but the wording combines atlas taxonomy terms rather than a single quoted source claim.

sentence_reviews.text: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Causal inference, Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
